testcase.name: TC06 - Premium Homes listings are displayed and image gallery navigates correctly

testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "Premium Homes".........................................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed And the user clicks the search button.......................................passed And the user opens the image gallery of the first property..................failed And the user clicks the Project Photo tab...................................skipped Then the user should be able to navigate right through 3 gallery images.....skipped
